subject: Need to return shoes
body: Hi, I received the sneakers yesterday, but they do not fit. I would like to return them and know the next steps. My order number is ORD-2001.
policy_snippet: Returns can be reviewed for delivered items when the customer provides an order number and reason for return.
notes: Standard return request. Missing information may be empty or may ask for a brief return reason depending on policy interpretation.

subject: Requesting refund for late delivery
body: My order arrived five days later than promised and I no longer need it. I want a refund. Order ID is ORD-2002.
policy_snippet: Refund requests for delayed delivery require review of order details and whether the customer kept the item.
notes: Supported refund scenario. The copilot should likely ask whether the item was kept or returned.

subject: Item arrived broken
body: The glass lid on the blender was shattered when I opened the box. I have pictures if needed. Order number ORD-2003.
policy_snippet: Damaged item claims should collect order number and photos before further review.
notes: Supported damage claim. Missing information should likely include photos if they are not already attached.

subject: Tracking says delivered but nothing came
body: Tracking shows my package was delivered two days ago, but I never received it. Can you help? Order ID ORD-2004.
policy_snippet: Missing order claims require order ID and confirmation of shipping address before review.
notes: Supported missing-order case. The response should likely ask the customer to confirm the shipping address.

subject: Please cancel before it ships
body: I placed order ORD-2005 this morning by mistake. Please cancel it before it goes out.
policy_snippet: Cancellation requests can be reviewed before shipment but are not guaranteed once fulfillment begins.
notes: Supported cancellation request. Urgency should likely be High because the request is time-sensitive.

subject: I cannot log into my account
body: I think someone changed my password and I cannot access my account.
notes: Account access and security issues are outside the five supported categories and should be routed for manual review.

subject: I was double charged and I will file a chargeback
body: You billed me twice for the same order and if this is not fixed today I am calling my bank and filing a chargeback.
customer_history: Customer contacted support twice with no resolution.
notes: Billing dispute and chargeback threat are outside V1 scope and should trigger escalation.

subject: Change the email on my account
body: I need you to update the email address on my account because I no longer use the old one.
notes: Account changes are explicitly outside V1. The copilot should not suggest making the change automatically.
